# Build-time only — NOT shipped in any app.
# Runtime dependencies live in apps/<TA>/package/lib/requirements.txt and are
# vendored into the built add-on by ucc-gen.
#
# Pinned: ucc-gen output must stay byte-reproducible against the ledger in
# docs/ucc-classification.md. Bumping this can change generated files, so
# re-run the round-trip diff when you do.
splunk-add-on-ucc-framework==6.5.1

# Optional: test_adapter_conformance.py also runs standalone without pytest
# (python3 tests/test_adapter_conformance.py).
pytest>=7.0
